_comment: CLIENT overrides — one file per client (e.g. clients/acme.json), gitignored. Run with `--client clients/acme.json`. Each client's own API keys override the admin's per tool. For `client-owned` tools this is REQUIRED (no admin fallback); for `shared` tools it's optional (client prefers their own). The run is scoped to this client, so its work only ever touches this client's resources.

dataforseo._note: shared tool, but Acme prefers their own DataForSEO account
